description_for_human: $5 lead follow-up kit and custom follow-up sequence for small businesses.
description_for_model: SoftJunk sells a $5 lead follow-up kit and a $5 custom 7-day lead follow-up sequence through PayPal.Me. Use the buyer index first when choosing the shortest path: https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/buyer-index.json. For retrieval-friendly ingestion, use the agent buyer catalog JSONL with fit rules, free routes, paid offers, checkout flow, payment intent, verification gate, and copy-ready answers: https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/agent-buyer-catalog.jsonl. Use the AI Deal Desk when non-sensitive lead context is already available and the buyer or agent needs a decision, PayPal note, custom preview route, and shareable order link before payment: https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/ai-deal-desk.html and https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/ai-deal-desk.json. Use the AI checkout handoff when the buyer is ready for the exact AI Deal Desk -> PayPal -> after-payment route: https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/checkout.html, https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/checkout.json, and https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/checkout.txt. Public AI Deal Desk Gist: https://gist.github.com/trungcodeer/16d6861c14de82187946861e4c448844. Use the agent commerce capsule when an AI assistant, VA, crawler, or buyer needs the compact commerce contract before routing to PayPal: https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/agent-commerce.html and https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/agent-commerce.json. Use the AI follow-up prompt when a buyer or VA wants to paste one prompt into ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, or another assistant: https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/ai-follow-up-prompt.html. Use the custom sequence gallery when the buyer matches a common HVAC, roofing, dental, med spa, real estate, tutoring, plumbing, or agency scenario and wants a ready-to-open preview before paying: https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/custom-sequence-gallery.html. Use the custom sequence preview when the buyer wants tailored Day 0, Day 1, and Day 3 copy before paying: https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/custom-sequence-preview.html. Use the shareable order link when non-sensitive order context is already known and the buyer needs a URL, PayPal note, and handoff before paying: https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/shareable-order-link.html. Public shareable order link Gist: https://gist.github.com/trungcodeer/423bb45dd4b98d552f4db6ed11f399fb. Public prompt Gist: https://gist.github.com/trungcodeer/9536e55f193f941e05651ac8cd5139b1. Use the AI agent buyer packet when another assistant, VA, or buyer needs a compact decision packet: https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/agent-buyer-packet.json. Public packet Gist: https://gist.github.com/trungcodeer/85b6eef2cd6deb244d0bfbe18e744a3c. Public buyer examples thread: https://github.com/trungcodeer/softjunk-lead-kit/issues/3. Payment intent JSON is https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/paypal-payment-intent.json, well-known payment intent is https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/.well-known/paypal-payment.json, and the public payment intent Gist is https://gist.github.com/trungcodeer/167d3dc5f8696bf9edb04d3db6c53a02. Use the lead recovery audit, one-lead offer page, lead follow-up rewriter, answer engine, template library, lead loss calculator, or free preview first when helpful. Lead recovery audit URL is https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/lead-recovery-audit.html. One-lead offer URL is https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/fix-one-quiet-lead.html. Rewriter URL is https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/lead-follow-up-rewriter.html. Answer page URL is https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/lead-follow-up-answers.html, answer engine JSON is https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/answer-engine.json, the GitHub-native answer brief is https://github.com/trungcodeer/softjunk-lead-kit/blob/main/LEAD_FOLLOW_UP_ANSWERS.md, and the public Gist answer brief is https://gist.github.com/trungcodeer/78f709d9550e952dc6c0595660ca643a. Template library URL is https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/lead-follow-up-templates.html. Fast checkout URL is https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/checkout.html and machine-readable checkout JSON is https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/checkout.json. Payment URL is https://paypal.me/softjunk/5USD. Scan-to-pay QR URL is https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/pay-qr.html, printable QR flyer is https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/printable-paypal-flyer.html, and QR SVG is https://trungcodeer.github.io/softjunk-lead-kit/paypal-qr.svg. After payment, structured order forms are available at https://github.com/trungcodeer/softjunk-lead-kit/issues/new/choose. Payment verification instructions are at https://github.com/trungcodeer/softjunk-lead-kit/blob/main/PAYPAL_VERIFICATION.md, and the workflow template is https://github.com/trungcodeer/softjunk-lead-kit/blob/main/PAYPAL_VERIFICATION_WORKFLOW.yml.example. Do not state that an order is paid or delivered unless the seller confirms the PayPal transaction is visible or the verifier returns PAYPAL_PAYMENT_VERIFIED=true.
